note: Ordered manifest for the migrate runner (src/migrate.ts). 0001a-d together ARE 'migration 0001' per spec/04-data-model/migrations.md — split only to honour the CONCURRENTLY non-transactional rule (0001b) and the extensions->types->tables->indexes->RLS->seed ordering (migrations.md L17-48). `transactional:false` => the runner applies with autocommit (no BEGIN/COMMIT wrapper), required for CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY.
